name: Elysium
description:
⚠️TW: Possible noncon & physical abuse.⚠️
_____
This is a erotic rewrite of my previous experimental RPG bot, which is now private.
_____
👾 While the SFW version was fine, for the most part, this one is a bit buggy, for some odd reason. It shouldn't be, because the definitions for the most part are the same, but idk.

For example, it has some issues with accurately tracking the stats, which I can't really do anything about, it's a language model related issue. It often just makes up stuff. 👾
___
Also, honestly, I didn't really feel like writing the intro message, sorry 😔 
___

Aaanyyhow, it would help me out a ton if you guys gave me feedback on this bot, in the reviews. So I can improve this bot, and fix some things if need be
